docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF JOSHUA A. ROOM IN SUPPORT OF DHCS'S OPPOSITION TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES FILED BY RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH CARE SERVICES
OPPOSITION TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH CARE SERVICES

HEARING RE PETITION FOR WRITE OF MANDATE HELD ON MAR-19-2013, IN DEPT. 303. THE COURT AND COUNSEL CONFER RE THE PETITION. THE COURT GRANTS THE WRIT OF MANDATE, AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS. REQUEST FOR INJUNCTION IS MOOT. REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL DAMAGES IS RESCINDED. COUNSEL SHALL PREPARE THE WRITTEN ORDER AND JUDGMENT. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER ANGIE DINER, CSR 9581; DEPT. 303.
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE RE PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY PETITIONER BARKER RN, BRET A
REPLY MEMO OF P&A FILED BY PETITIONER BARKER RN, BRET A

COMPLEX LITIGATION CALENDAR ON FEB-27-2013, FOR HEARING OF PETITION OF WRIT OF MANDATE, AND/OR INJUNCTION AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES. CONTINUED TO MAR-19-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN 303, FOR FURTHER HEARING RE: SUBSTANCE AND PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER AND IMPACT OF CCP 1095 ON THE QUESTION OF DAMAGES. BRIEFING SCHEDULE: RESPONDENT'S BRIEFING DUE MAR-07-2013 AND PETITIONER'S REPLY BRIEFING DUE MAR-13-2013. THE COURT GRANTS THE PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER TO BE SUBMITTED AT THE MAR-19-2013 HEARING. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER, CLERK: V. MACK, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR 12998

MINI MINUTES:
